name: system_prompt_bubble
description: S5.G -- assert the collapsed system-prompt bubble renders at the top of the chat WebView at launch. Deterministic: no LLM needed; the chat panel calls set_system_prompt_bubble during LocusFrame construction from the immutable SystemPromptAssembly. The summary header 'System prompt (N tokens)' is always visible regardless of the <details> open/closed state; chip breakdown only appears when expanded, which UIA can't reliably drive inside WebView2, so it stays in the manual test plan.
